DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT'S RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND FOR AN ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS; AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS IS DEEMED ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED AND DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE ANSWERS WITHIN 5 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE SIGNED ORDER. PLAINTIFFS ARE AWARDED MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $750. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS MARTIN GAEHWILER, SR. AND MARTIN GAEHWILER, JR.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB)

Notice To Motion To Compel Deft'S Responses To Interogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, For An Order Establishing Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Weldon E. Bradstreet, Esq. of SHEPPART, ROSEN (415/296-0900, X26), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Martin Gaehwiler, Sr, Trustee of the Gaehwiler 2000 Trust, and Martin Gaehwiler Jr.

Ruling:
No other appearances. Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Production of Documents, And For An Order Establishing Admissions; And For Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Request for admissions is deemed admitted. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted and defendant shall provide answers within 5 days of notice of entry of the signed order. Plaintiffs are awarded monetary sanctions in the amount of $750. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
